items.title: Israel and Hezbollah agree ceasefire, US says, as more Lebanon strikes reported
items.summary: The agreement followed concerns that continued clashes would undermine the deal to end the war between the US and Iran.

items.title: Italy's Meloni says Trump 'made up' story that she 'begged' him for photo at G7

items.title: US to stop funding HIV programmes in South Africa
items.summary: More than eight million South Africans are living with HIV – the highest number of any country in the world.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 日本東京小學火災釀11輕重傷 學童驚險逃生畫面曝光
items.summary: 日本東京都北區瀧野川第三小學，19日在校舍4樓「音樂準備室」竄出火苗，導致教師、學童11人輕重傷，而師生驚險從3樓屋簷逃生的畫面讓網友們看了驚叫連連。  據《讀賣新聞》報導，...…

items.title: 卡達贈送飛行白宮  川普開箱新「空軍一號」驚人造價曝光
items.summary: 美國日前換下一架服務超過30年的美國總統座機「空軍一號」，由卡達政府贈送的波音747-8i豪華專機預計將納入「空軍一號」機隊。不過該架專機造價約4億美元（約新台幣118億元）也掀...…

items.title: 好貴！北海道「黑皮西瓜」拍賣 1顆快要14萬元
items.summary: 日本北海道當麻町特產「田助西瓜（でんすけすいか）」，以黑色果皮、鮮紅果肉與爽脆口感聞名，19日展開今年首次拍賣，結果有1顆以70萬日圓（約新台幣13.7萬元）賣出。  綜合日...…
